top3.sql:
SELECT 
    ms.StyleName,
    SUM(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FirstPreferenceCount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SecondPreferenceCount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThirdPreferenceCount
FROM Musical_Styles ms
LEFT JOIN Musical_Preferences mp ON ms.StyleID = mp.StyleID
GROUP BY ms.StyleName;

SELECT 
    ms.StyleName,
    SUM(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FirstPreferenceCount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SecondPreferenceCount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThirdPreferenceCount
FROM Musical_Styles ms
LEFT JOIN Musical_Preferences mp ON ms.StyleID = mp.StyleID
GROUP BY ms.StyleName;

SELECT 
    ms.StyleName,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 1 THEN 1 END) AS FirstPreferenceCount,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 2 THEN 1 END) AS SecondPreferenceCount,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 3 THEN 1 END) AS ThirdPreferenceCount
FROM Musical_Styles ms
LEFT JOIN Musical_Preferences mp ON ms.StyleID = mp.StyleID
GROUP BY ms.StyleName;

SELECT 
    ms.StyleName,
    SUM(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FirstPreferenceCount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SecondPreferenceCount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThirdPreferenceCount
FROM Musical_Styles ms
LEFT JOIN Musical_Preferences mp ON ms.StyleID = mp.StyleID
GROUP BY ms.StyleName;

SELECT 
    ms.StyleName,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 1 THEN 1 END) AS FirstPreferenceCount,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 2 THEN 1 END) AS SecondPreferenceCount,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 3 THEN 1 END) AS ThirdPreferenceCount
FROM Musical_Styles ms
LEFT JOIN Musical_Preferences mp ON ms.StyleID = mp.StyleID
GROUP BY ms.StyleName;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    ms.StyleName,
    SUM(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FirstPreferenceCount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SecondPreferenceCount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThirdPreferenceCount
FROM Musical_Styles ms
LEFT JOIN Musical_Preferences mp ON ms.StyleID = mp.StyleID
GROUP BY ms.StyleName;
